note: Production estimates from independent sources. USDA = USDA FAS PSD (Coffee: World Markets and Trade, Dec 2025); CONAB = Companhia Nacional de Abastecimento, 4º Levantamento Café, Dec 2025; ICO = International Coffee Organization Coffee Market Report. USDA persistently reports higher than CONAB (CONAB is a field survey, USDA includes adjustments). Static seed — refresh after each crop year's Dec USDA / CONAB release.
